playbook.intent: Roadmap re-aligned with last week's signals; 2-3 swimlane bets reconfirmed or flagged; deltas posted to Linear/Productboard; async note shipped to founders + EM by end of day.
playbook.scope: Roadmap re-aligned with last week's signals; 2-3 swimlane bets reconfirmed or flagged; deltas posted to Linear/Productboard; async note shipped to founders + EM by end of day.

success-criteria.criterion: Every active bet has a confirm/refute/wait status
Async broadcast sent by end of day Monday
Drift result recorded for the quarter

stage.name: Signal scan
stage.intent: Pull last week's signals before touching the roadmap.

tasks.task: Skim metrics dashboard for deltas vs target
Skim support and sales notes for emerging themes

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the digest fits on half a page.

stage.name: Bet review
stage.intent: Re-confirm each swimlane bet against the signals.

tasks.task: For each active bet, ask: do this week's signals confirm or refute it?
Flag bets with refute-signals; reconfirm bets with confirm-signals
Tag bets that need more data

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every active bet has a one-word status.

stage.name: Delta application
stage.intent: Apply roadmap deltas in the tracker.

tasks.task: Move refuted bets to parking lot with reason
Promote any confirm-signals item from later to next
Re-rank Next by RICE if any new info changed inputs

stage.decision-gate: Advance when tracker matches the bet status table.

stage.name: Async broadcast

tasks.task: Draft a 5-bullet broadcast: deltas, asks, blockers, decisions needed, next-week focus
Address it to founders + EM + design lead
Send by end of day Monday

stage.decision-gate: Advance when broadcast is sent and acknowledged.

stage.name: Drift sanity check
stage.intent: Run a quick drift detector against OKRs.

tasks.task: Compare top-3 in-flight items against the quarter's OKRs
Flag any item not tied to an OKR for kill or re-justify
Log the drift result for the quarterly retro

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written drift result (even if zero items flagged).

extra.value: {human: faion get-content monday-roadmap-pulse-review --format md, agent: faion get-content monday-roadmap-pulse-review --format context, json: faion get-content monday-roadmap-pulse-review --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
